description: Score a list of SMILES with a TDC molecular oracle (QED, SA, LogP, GSK3B, DRD2, JNK3, ...) for molecular optimization.
rules: read-only — evaluates molecules against a property/target oracle; nothing is mutated remotely
SMILES are read one per line from the TDC_SMILES file
PyTDC downloads oracle weights on first use; degrades gracefully (skipped report) when tdc/network is absent
per-SMILES scores + summary (mean/min/max) are written to record_store as scores.json
usage: Set TDC_ORACLE (e.g. QED, SA, LogP, GSK3B, DRD2) and TDC_SMILES (path to a text file with one SMILES per line). Output: scores.json.
limitation: Read-only. Requires the PyTDC package (and rdkit / downloaded oracle assets) plus network access on first use; offline it emits a skipped report. Some oracles (Docking, Vina, ASKCOS) need extra heavy dependencies.
